lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Adventurer, you must hurry! You have freed the members of the secret council, but we must ensure that the Culinaromancer is defeated once and for all!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Follow him into the portal and make sure he never leaves again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... You don't happen to remember what I did after the Culinaromancer escaped into that magic portal thingy do you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course I do! It was amazing!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: You jumped in right behind him and fought him to the death!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Oh yeah, that's right. And it was a really easy fight wasn't it...?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Oh no! You told me it was really hard, and that you had to defeat a string of monsters without any prayer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. I did, did I? Oh.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Now you've freed them all, I'll restart time so you can deal with the culinaromancer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're sure...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: TEMPUS PROCEDIT!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: We have broken your feeble spell! Begone!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: You DARED to meddle?

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: But you cannot defeat me! I'LL BE BACK!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hooray - he's gone!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: One day he'll return. You must go through the portal and finish him off.

sections.title: Entering the portal for the first time

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: [Player], I must warn you, inside that dimension you will have no assistance from the gods, and your prayers will not work at all!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Also be aware that he will use his powers to draw upon the might of foes you have fought before, and that dimensional instability means that your lost items will be irretrievable should you die...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Take care, I suspect the Culinaromancer will not give up so easily!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: You DARE come HERE?!?!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: Say hello to my little friend!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: NOOOooo...

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: You will regret following me!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: I will not be thwarted by you!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: NOOOooo...

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: You should not meddle in affairs that do not concern you!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: I have waited a long time for my revenge!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: NOOOooo...

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: This will be your death!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: Let's see how you deal with this!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: NOOOooo...

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: I still have a few tricks left!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: You've been lucky so far, but no more!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: You have caused me enough grief! I guess I'll have to finish you off myself!

lines.speaker: Culinaromancer
lines.text: It seems I will have to deal with you myself!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Good work [player]! I think that will be the last we'll see of him! You'd better come back now.
